Law and the Multiverse analyzes ‘The Hobbit’ Contract

Posted on January 10, 2013 by Joseph J. Ross, Esq.

Law and the Multiverse analyzes ‘The Hobbit’ Contract

I love several things about this:

  1. This is only the first in an ongoing series, with three other parts as of the moment I published this post.
  2. You can buy the contract from Peter Jackson’s film adaptation of The Hobbit on Amazon.
  3. James Daily, who wrote the post to which I link above, bought that prop contract from Amazon and used it in the creation of the article series.

Wonderfully fun stuff!

About Joseph J. Ross, Esq.

I'm a lawyer, writer and geek currently working as a judicial law clerk. I write about privacy, national security, intellectual property, LGBTQ and many, many other legal topics.
